name: Cheese Ball#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the cheeses soften slightly.
2. Mix together all ingredients except the garnish of your choice.
3. Form the mixture into a ball and chill for several hours (2 to 24).
4. Take the cheese ball out of the refrigerator 30 minutes before serving.
5. Garnish with chopped pecans, walnuts (halves or pieces), or parsley.
6. Serve with crackers.
